news.headline: Bybit offers $140M bounty for $1.4B ETH hack recovery, aiming 10% of funds to experts. Biggest crypto recovery effort.
news.summary: Following a $1.4 billion Ethereum (CRYPTO: ETH) theft, Bybit exchange has initiated a recovery bounty program with up to 10% reward for cybersecurity experts aiding in the retrieval of the stolen assets. This equates to a potential $140 million bounty, marking it as one of the largest crypto recovery endeavors to date. Ben Zhou expressed gratitude for the support received within 24 hours of the incident, emphasizing unity in the face of adversity and the resilience of the crypto community. This information can be found on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Bybit announces $140M bounty for recovery of $1.4B in Ethereum stolen in record-breaking crypto hack.
news.summary: Bybit, a cryptocurrency exchange, is offering a reward of $140 million for assistance in recovering the $1.4 billion worth of Ethereum stolen during a hack that occurred on Friday.

news.headline: Nvidia's earnings report on Feb. 26 and Amazon set to reveal new 'AI Alexa' voice assistant. Big tech in 'Show Me' moment.
news.summary: Nvidia, a leading chip maker, is set to announce its earnings on February 26, along with Salesforce. Additionally, Amazon is anticipated to introduce a new 'AI Alexa' voice assistant. As part of a broader trend in AI stocks, significant tech giants and cloud industry leaders are facing a crucial moment to demonstrate their capabilities. Nvidia's upcoming earnings report is particularly anticipated in this context.

news.headline: President Trump will appear at CPAC 2025 alongside Mike Lindell Media Corp., known as FSBN, with LindellTV team.
news.summary: The President of the United States made a rare appearance at CPAC 2025, joining Mike Lindell Media Corp. and the LindellTV media team. Led by Mike Lindell, the team consists of skilled on-air media professionals who prioritize delivering unbiased news, in contrast to traditional media outlets. LindellTV stands out for its accurate news reporting and the impressive appearance of its reporters. This marks a refreshing departure from legacy media, emphasizing a combination of truth and beauty in news dissemination.

CUPE releases picket line locations for Calgary, Foothills, and Black Gold strikes on Feb 24, 2025. Key locations to be aware: CUPE 40 at McDougall Centre and Calgary Board of Education head office in Calgary; CUPE 520 at McDougall Centre in Calgary.
news.summary: In Calgary, the Canadian Union of Public Employees has announced picket line locations for Monday, February 24, 2025. These locations are specific to Monday and are subject to change in the future. CUPE 40, representing the Calgary Board of Education, will picket at McDougall Centre, 455 6 St SW, Calgary from 7:00 am to 9:00 am, and then move to the Calgary Board of Education head office at 1221 8 St SW, Calgary from 9:00 am to 11:00 am. Similarly, CUPE 520, representing the Calgary Catholic School Division, will also picket at McDougall Centre from 7:00 am to 9:00 am.

news.headline: Post-Bitcoin halving sparks new prospects for blockchain, reshaping global markets with decentralized technology advancements.
news.summary: Following the recent Bitcoin halving, a significant event that occurs approximately every four years, the cryptocurrency market is experiencing a period of post-halving adjustment. This event, which reduces the reward for Bitcoin miners by half, has historically led to increased scarcity and a potential rise in the value of Bitcoin. The latest halving, which took place in May 2020, reduced the block reward from 12.5 to 6.25 Bitcoin per block. This adjustment is expected to impact the supply and demand dynamics of Bitcoin, potentially driving up its price in the long term. The post-halving period presents both opportunities and challenges for the cryptocurrency market, as well as for decentralized technology as a whole. This phase will likely play a crucial role in shaping the future of cryptocurrencies and their influence on global markets.

news.headline: Wall Street retreats from record highs as Walmart's stock drops by 6.5%, Federal Reserve emphasizes inflation risks. Chinese tech stocks surge with Alibaba rising 8.1%, driven by strong earnings and potential policy easing. Read more on Benzinga.com.
news.summary: Last week, Wall Street saw a retreat from record highs due to Walmart's cautious profit outlook, resulting in a 6.5% decline in the stock. The Federal Reserve highlighted inflation risks in its latest meeting, with officials emphasizing the need for more evidence of cooling inflation before considering rate cuts. On a positive note, Chinese tech stocks surged, with Alibaba rising 8.1% after strong earnings and optimistic guidance. The rally was fueled by speculation of potential monetary policy easing and fiscal stimulus measures in China. Benzinga provides daily reports on popular stocks for investors, with this past week witnessing both bullish and bearish trends in the market.

news.headline: Traffic Safety Agency dismisses officials investigating Tesla after raising concerns about self-driving crashes.
news.summary: Concerns have been raised by the National Highway Traffic Safety Administration regarding incidents involving Tesla's autonomous driving technology. The agency is investigating accidents involving Tesla vehicles that occurred while the self-driving feature was engaged. This has prompted scrutiny over the safety and effectiveness of Tesla's self-driving systems. The NHTSA has reported an increase in crashes involving Tesla vehicles, with a total of X accidents under investigation at this time. These developments highlight growing concerns over the reliability of self-driving technology and its impact on road safety.

news.headline: Berkshire Hathaway's Q4 profits surge 71% to $14.5B, Buffett criticizes 'Tech Titans' tax payments, GEICO earnings double.
news.summary: The annual report of Berkshire Hathaway Inc. revealed a significant 71% increase in operating earnings for the fourth quarter, totaling $14.5 billion. This boost was mainly driven by a 48% increase in insurance investment income, reaching $4.1 billion, and a fourfold increase in operating earnings from the insurance underwriting business, amounting to $3.4 billion. GEICO, a key contributor, more than doubled its pretax underwriting earnings to $7.8 billion in 2024. The company attributed this success to a rise in interest rates, which enhanced investment income, and growth in its insurance business. Warren Buffett's leadership at the Nebraska-based conglomerate was instrumental in this impressive performance.

news.headline: SEC will end investigation into Ethereum NFT platform, OpenSea. CEO confirms regulator's change in direction under Trump.
news.summary: The CEO of OpenSea, Devin Finzer, announced on Friday that the Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) is concluding its investigation. This decision comes as a part of a change in direction by the regulatory body during the presidency of Trump.

NICB warns of fraud post floods in Eastern Kentucky & Tennessee Valley. Tens of millions in damages expected.
news.summary: In an effort to prevent contractor fraud in response to devastating flooding in the Eastern Kentucky and Tennessee Valley region, best practices have been recommended in Oak Brook, Illinois on February 22, 2025. The recent record rainfall caused extensive flooding, potentially leading to damage estimated in the tens of millions of dollars. It is crucial to take proactive measures to deter fraudulent activity and ensure efficient recovery efforts in the affected areas.

news.headline: Authorities dismiss employees probing Tesla over self-driving accidents; National Highway Traffic Safety Administration involved.
news.summary: The National Highway Traffic Safety Administration is investigating incidents related to Tesla's autonomous driving system. The agency is examining reported crashes and has raised concerns regarding the safety of Tesla's self-driving technology. The exact number of accidents under review has not been disclosed, but it is significant enough to warrant attention from the regulatory body. This development raises doubts about the reliability and effectiveness of Tesla's autopilot feature, highlighting potential risks associated with utilizing autonomous driving capabilities. Tesla may face scrutiny and potential repercussions based on the findings of the investigation.

Elon Musk and Jack Welch, both influential cost-cutters, share a focus on the bottom line in Washington and Silicon Valley.
news.summary: Elon Musk's intense focus on financial performance has elevated his status in Washington and Silicon Valley. This approach contrasts with that of the renowned cost-cutting executive, Jack Welch. Musk's emphasis on the bottom line has solidified his influence, driving his prominence in both sectors. Comparisons can be drawn between Musk's financial strategies and those of Welch, indicating how their respective approaches to cost management have shaped their reputations and impact on the industries they operate in.

news.headline: Berkshire Hathaway Inc. releases Q4 and full year 2023/2024 earnings details, urging readers to check annual report. Visit website for full info.

Investors and reporters are encouraged to review the 2024 Annual Report available at www.berkshirehathaway.com for a comprehensive understanding. news.headline: Boost your dog's health on Walk the Dog Day with Nutra Thrive supplement. Supports hip & joint, immune, antioxidant, & heart health.
news.summary: On February 22, 2025, in Los Angeles, Ultimate Pet Nutrition introduced Nutra Thrive for Dogs, a comprehensive supplement providing hip & joint, immune, antioxidant, and heart support. This coincided with Walk the Dog Day, highlighting the significance of daily walks in enhancing a dog's well-being. This supplement aims to promote overall health in dogs, with key benefits targeting different areas such as joints, immunity, and heart health. The announcement aligns with the theme of promoting healthy lifestyles for pets, emphasizing the importance of incorporating essential nutrients into their daily routine.

Research firm Santiment identifies 3 bullish indicators for Bitcoin, with wallets showing -2.9% average returns in the past 30 days.
news.summary: A market intelligence firm, Santiment, has pointed out three key metrics indicating a potential bullish trend for Bitcoin (CRYPTO: BTC). The average returns of wallets, the dormancy period of coins, and Bitcoin's supply on exchanges all point towards a potential upward movement for the top cryptocurrency by market cap. Santiment's analysis shows that accumulating BTC when wallets' average returns are below 0% historically has been a successful strategy. Currently, wallets active in the past 30 days reflect average returns of about -2.9%, suggesting a statistically advantageous opportunity for buying or increasing positions. Furthermore, there is a steady circulation of older BTC tokens, indicating a promising outlook for the cryptocurrency.
